items.name: [PBR] Fallen Wings: Abyssal Wings of Old Glory
items.description:
Forged in the depths of forgotten darkness, these wings embody the remnants of ancient battles and shattered light. Their abyssal hue whispers of fallen heroes, carrying the weight of both pride and sorrow. Once radiant, now shadowed — they are a testament to lost glory that refuses to fade.

Price: 1000/11 Stock
